spec.rawSql:
SELECT
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(completed_at) - MIN(started_at))) AS
  duration_seconds
  FROM device_results
  WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at)
  GROUP BY job_id

SELECT
    MIN(started_at) AS time,
    EXTRACT(HOUR FROM MIN(started_at))::int AS hour
  FROM device_results
  WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at)
  GROUP BY job_id
  ORDER BY time

SELECT ROUND(AVG(c),1) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) c FROM
    device_results GROUP BY job_id) t

SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status='success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
/ COUNT(*), 1) FROM device_results

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at,$__interval),
AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (completed_at-started_at))) AS avg_duration
FROM device_results WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at,$__interval),
    SUM(commands_sent) AS sent, SUM(commands_verified) AS verified FROM
    device_results WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT device_type, COUNT(*) AS pushes FROM device_results
  WHERE
    $__timeFilter(started_at) GROUP BY device_type ORDER BY pushes DESC

SELECT device_type, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN
  status='success'
    THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS success_rate FROM
  device_results
     WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) GROUP BY device_type

SELECT device_ip, COUNT(*) AS failures FROM device_results
  WHERE
    status IN ('failed','partial') AND $__timeFilter(started_at) GROUP
  BY
     device_ip ORDER BY failures DESC LIMIT 10
